TH_YUYUKO-SPRING_POWER.title: Spring
TH_YUYUKO-SPRING_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, apply stacks amount of [gold]Death Wish[/gold] to all enemies, and trigger extra effects based on the stacks.
TH_YUYUKO-SPRING_POWER.smartDescription:
At the start of your turn:
Apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Death Wish[/gold] to all enemies.{SummonCount:cond:>0?
Randomly [gold]Summon Butterfly[/gold] [blue]{SummonCount}[/blue] times.|}{DemiseCount:cond:>0?
Apply [blue]{DemiseCount}[/blue] [gold]Demise[/gold] to all enemies.|}{SakuraCount:cond:>0?
Put [blue]{SakuraCount}[/blue] [gold]Falling Cherry[/gold] into your hand.|}{Amount:cond:>=30?
[green]Spring Enhancement[/green]: All [gold]Butterfly[/gold] effects enhanced.|}{Amount:cond:>=100?
[gold]Death Wish[/gold] stacks will instead increase by [blue]66%[/blue].|>=75?
[gold]Death Wish[/gold] stacks will no longer decrease.|}
TH_YUYUKO-DEATH_POWER.title: Death Wish
TH_YUYUKO-DEATH_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, lose stacks amount of Max HP, then reduce stacks by [blue]66%[/blue].
TH_YUYUKO-DEATH_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Max HP, then reduce stacks by [blue]66%[/blue].
TH_YUYUKO-DEATH_DESIRE_POWER.title: Death Lust
TH_YUYUKO-DEATH_DESIRE_POWER.description: For stacks turns, deal [blue]25%[/blue] less damage and take [blue]25%[/blue] more damage. Effect is doubled if the enemy has [gold]Death Wish[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-DEATH_DESIRE_POWER.smartDescri: For [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turns, deal [blue]25%[/blue] less damage and take [blue]25%[/blue] more damage. Effect doubled with [gold]Death Wish[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-BUTTERFLY_SOUL_POWER.title: Soul Butterfly
TH_YUYUKO-BUTTERFLY_SOUL_POWER.descripti:
Whenever you deal damage, put [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Soul[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold], then reduce stacks by [blue]1[/blue].
[green]Spring Enhancement[/green]: Put into hand instead.
TH_YUYUKO-BUTTERFLY_SOUL_POWER.smartDesc:
Whenever you deal damage, put [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Soul[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold], then reduce stacks by [blue]1[/blue].
[green]Spring Enhancement[/green]: Put into hand instead.
TH_YUYUKO-BUTTERFLY_ENERGY_POWER.title: Spirit Butterfly
TH_YUYUKO-BUTTERFLY_ENERGY_POWER.descrip:
Whenever you deal damage, gain [blue]1[/blue] energy, then reduce stacks by [blue]1[/blue].
[green]Spring Enhancement[/green]: Gain stacks amount of energy.
TH_YUYUKO-BUTTERFLY_ENERGY_POWER.smartDe:
Whenever you deal damage, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}, then reduce stacks by [blue]1[/blue].
[green]Spring Enhancement[/green]: Gain {Amount:energyIcons()}.
TH_YUYUKO-BUTTERFLY_DEATH_POWER.title: Death Butterfly
TH_YUYUKO-BUTTERFLY_DEATH_POWER.descript:
Whenever you deal damage, apply stacks amount of [gold]Death Wish[/gold] to the enemy, then reduce stacks by [blue]1[/blue].
[green]Spring Enhancement[/green]: Apply [gold]Death Wish[/gold] equal to the damage dealt.
TH_YUYUKO-BUTTERFLY_DEATH_POWER.smartDes:
Whenever you deal damage, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Death Wish[/gold], then reduce stacks by [blue]1[/blue].
[green]Spring Enhancement[/green]: Apply [gold]Death Wish[/gold] equal to the damage dealt.
TH_YUYUKO-LANTERN_FLOWER_POWER.title: Lantern of Rebirth, Flower of the Afterlife
TH_YUYUKO-LANTERN_FLOWER_POWER.descripti: For each card you play, at the start of your next turn gain [blue]1[/blue] energy and draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
TH_YUYUKO-LANTERN_FLOWER_POWER.smartDesc: For each card you play, at the start of your next turn gain {Amount:energyIcons()} and draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card(s).
TH_YUYUKO-TOXIN_MOTH_POWER.title: Toxic Moth
TH_YUYUKO-TOXIN_MOTH_POWER.description: When you trigger a [gold]Butterfly[/gold] effect this turn, apply an additional stacks amount of [gold]Poison[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-TOXIN_MOTH_POWER.smartDescript: When you trigger a [gold]Butterfly[/gold] effect this turn, apply an additional [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Poison[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-MIRROR_POWER.title: Magic Mirror
TH_YUYUKO-MIRROR_POWER.description: When attacked this turn, apply stacks amount of [gold]Death Wish[/gold] to all enemies.
TH_YUYUKO-MIRROR_POWER.smartDescription: When attacked this turn, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Death Wish[/gold] to all enemies.
TH_YUYUKO-REVERSING_SCREEN_POWER.title: Reversing Screen
TH_YUYUKO-REVERSING_SCREEN_POWER.descrip: When attacked this turn, deal equal damage to all enemies.
TH_YUYUKO-REVERSING_SCREEN_POWER.smartDe: When attacked over the next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turn(s), deal equal damage to all enemies.

TH_YUYUKO-SEAMLESS_GHOST_POWER.descripti: Whenever you draw, play, or [gold]Exhaust[/gold] an [gold]Ethereal[/gold] card, gain stacks amount of [gold]Block[/gold].

TH_YUYUKO-HAKUGYOKUROU_GHOST_POWER.title: Hakugyokurou's Hungry Ghost Legend
TH_YUYUKO-HAKUGYOKUROU_GHOST_POWER.descr:

At the end of your turn, if no card was [gold]Exhausted[/gold] this turn, gain 2 [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Frail[/gold].
